series_metadata.series_title: Annual Listing Of Dealers And Nurseries
series_metadata.series_description: The division produces several hundred copies of this each year. One copy goes to each county agent in Ohio (Cooperative Extension Agent), and trade groups get a copy (i.e. Ohio Nursery and Landscape Organization). One copy also goes to each state''s Plant Pest Control department.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Keep 1 copy of each year''s book
